positive: A vibrant, retro synthwave illustration of a lone astronaut floating past a massive, stylized planet at sunset. The aesthetic is heavily inspired by 1980s vaporwave and cyberpunk art. The sky gradient is electric pink, neon purple, and turquoise. The astronaut suit has glowing cyan accents. The planet has geometric, crystalline formations. Highly saturated colors, neon glow effect, synthwave vaporwave style, vector art quality, high contrast, cinematic, 8k, album cover art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, naturalistic, dull colors, sepia, grainy, realistic photography
